reviews.review_description: Played single mode for a while, and I could not beat the third stage against AI. Wish it was a bit easier. Really liked how I had to reload each bullet by hand while avoid getting shot from the AI. Wish I could also move like one. Fun!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for playing the single-player mode and for sharing your experience. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed the tension of manually reloading each bullet while avoiding enemy fire. Those high-pressure moments are a big part of what makes the duels feel intense.

We understand that the third stage can feel quite challenging. The AI difficulty is designed to gradually test timing, positioning, and reload management, but we also recognize that it should remain fair and enjoyable. We will continue reviewing the balance to ensure it feels tough in a rewarding way.

Your comment about wanting to move like the AI is also valuable feedback. We are always looking at ways to refine player expression and movement within the comfort limits of VR.

Thank you again for playing and for your thoughtful feedback.

reviews.review_description: Welcome to the wild wild west~ - Will Smith. Why do I know this song, well I know this too, the game is fun when your friends are watching! They make fun of you for sucking. I know I did too tho!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for the fun and lively review. We love that Wildwest brings out that playful “wild wild west” energy.

It is great to hear that the game becomes even more entertaining when friends are watching and joking around. Those moments of missing shots, fumbling reloads, and laughing together are exactly the kind of social experience we hoped to create.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing the fun atmosphere with your friends.

reviews.review_description: Store on the second floor is genius. I first thought I had to buy characters but changing character was free and now I am shooting arrows instead of bullets. Reloading is not that fun but still running with it!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your fun and thoughtful review. We are glad you discovered the store on the second floor and enjoyed the character change feature. Making customization accessible without forcing purchases was an intentional choice, so it is great to hear that it felt like a pleasant surprise.

It is also interesting to hear your thoughts about switching to arrows instead of bullets. Each weapon style is designed to offer a slightly different rhythm and feel. We understand that reloading with certain weapons may not feel as satisfying to everyone, and feedback like yours helps us continue refining the experience.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: I have not played the free version but decided to go with the actual one because the graphic looked legit. When you first go in, you can change language of your choice. I believe there are five to six support languages. The tutorial guy then speaks too much. I was trying to read them all but it was too long to read. Then, when I skipped them by pressing B button, I could not figure out which button to press to reload. It took me sometime but that was fine and fun. There are several modes you can enjoy and to be honest, my favorite was the single player mode where you can fight with the AI. AI moves with flow and it would have been great if I could also mimic that move. There is also 1 on 1 and 2 on2 modes which make the game a great party game to play with friends, and with a bet on the line.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your detailed and honest review. We truly appreciate you choosing the full version and giving Wildwest a proper try.

We are glad to hear that the visuals and language support made a positive first impression. At the same time, we understand your feedback about the tutorial guide talking too much and the difficulty in figuring out the reload controls after skipping it. That is very valuable insight. We are currently looking into ways to make the tutorial clearer, more concise, and easier to navigate even if parts are skipped.

It is great to hear that you enjoyed the different modes, especially the single-player mode against AI. We are happy that the AI movement felt smooth and natural to you. Your comment about wanting to mimic that flow as a player is also noted, and we will consider how to enhance player movement expression in future updates.

We are also glad that you see the 1v1 and 2v2 modes as a great party experience. Playing with friends and adding a little competitive spirit definitely makes the Wildwest atmosphere even more fun.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing such thoughtful feedback.

Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for the energetic review. Sometimes Wildwest really does come down to that simple rhythm keep shooting, manage your reloads, and stay focused.

We are glad you are enjoying the fast-paced action and the straightforward fun the game offers.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your excitement.

reviews.review_title: Fun, but Feels a Bit Light
reviews.review_description: The Wild West game is definitely fun, but it feels like there isn;t a whole lot to do once you get used to it. I think it would be way more enjoyable if there were things like a story mode or more content to keep playing for longer.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your honest and constructive feedback. We are glad to hear that you are having fun with Wildwest.

We understand your point about the game feeling a bit light once you get used to the core mechanics. Expanding the experience with additional content—such as a story mode or new modes to encourage longer play sessions—is something we are actively considering as we continue developing the game.

Your feedback helps us shape the future direction of Wildwest. Thank you again for playing and for sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: the first tutorial line shows non-English words. Some lines literally say 'tutorial line #xx'. the actual game was fun but tutorial needs fix.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for reporting this issue. The tutorial displaying non-English text and placeholder lines such as “tutorial line #xx” is clearly not intended behavior, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

This is most likely a localization or build-related error, and we are actively reviewing the tutorial text implementation to fix these issues as quickly as possible. Your report helps us identify and prioritize these problems.

We are glad to hear that you still found the actual game fun despite the tutorial issue. We will work to ensure the onboarding experience matches the quality of the gameplay.

Thank you again for your feedback and support.

reviews.review_description: The shooting mechanics feel good and the game is easy to pick up, but after a while it can start to feel a bit repetitive. There’s nothing wrong with the core gameplay, it just needs more variety to keep things fresh. With a few more modes or challenges, it could be much more engaging long-term.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your thoughtful and constructive feedback. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed the shooting mechanics and found the game easy to pick up. That balance between accessibility and satisfying VR gunplay is something we care deeply about.

We also appreciate your honest point about repetition. You are absolutely right that long-term engagement depends on variety. Expanding the game with additional modes, challenges, and fresh gameplay elements is something we are actively considering to keep the experience exciting over time.

Feedback like yours helps us shape the future direction of Wildwest. Thank you again for playing and for taking the time to share your insights.

reviews.review_description: I'm really enjoying this game so far, but I'd love to see  more modes that you can fully enjoy on your own. Not everyone always has someone to play with, and this game feels like it has a lot of potential for solid solo experiences too. may be DLC? I hope the developers consider adding more single-player contents in future updates.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your thoughtful feedback. We are truly glad to hear that you are enjoying the game so far.

You are absolutely right that not everyone always has someone to play with, and we understand the importance of having strong solo content. Expanding the single-player experience with additional modes, missions, or possibly DLC is something we are seriously considering as we continue developing Wildwest.

The game definitely has room to grow on the solo side, and feedback like yours helps us prioritize future updates.

Thank you again for supporting Wildwest and for sharing your hopes for the future of the game.

reviews.review_title: Made me feel like a kid again!
reviews.review_description: The graphics/art style or whatever you wanna call it reminds me of reading one of those children's book with pictures in it. The reloading aspect was confusing during tutorial but once I got the hang of it during the gunfight with the AI, I was good enough not to lose.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you so much for your thoughtful review. Hearing that Wildwest made you feel like a kid again truly means a lot to us. The art style was designed to feel expressive and a bit storybook-like, so we are very happy that it reminded you of illustrated children’s books.

We also appreciate your honest feedback about the reloading tutorial. We understand that it can feel confusing at first, especially for new players. We will continue improving the tutorial experience to make the mechanics clearer and more intuitive from the beginning.

It is great to hear that once you got used to it during the AI gunfight, you were able to hold your own. Thank you again for playing and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: I jump in thinking “just one round” and suddenly way more time has passed. THE SHOOTING FEELS SO GOOD, and it’s really easy to pick up without feeling stressful. I’d definitely play this even more if there was a story mode or more things to do with friends. THIS GAME IS WAY MORE FUN THAN I THOUGHT 🤠🔥

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you so much for your enthusiastic review. We are really happy to hear that you jump in for “just one round” and end up playing much longer. That is exactly the kind of experience we hope to create.

It means a lot to us that you feel the shooting mechanics are satisfying and easy to pick up without being stressful. Creating smooth and enjoyable VR gunplay has always been one of our top priorities.

We truly appreciate your request for a story mode and more activities to enjoy with friends. Expanding the game with deeper content and additional modes is something we are actively considering for future updates.

Thank you again for your support and for sharing your excitement about Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: Wild West is just pure chaos in a good way. You jump in thinking it'd be simple and then suddenly you're reloading like a maniac, trying to shoot faster than your eyes can keep up. It's not deep, not complicated, but insanely satisfying once you get the hang of it!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for such an energetic and positive review. We are really glad to hear that Wildwest ended up being way more fun than you expected.

That “pure chaos in a good way” feeling where you are frantically reloading and trying to outdraw your opponent is exactly the kind of intensity we wanted to capture. It may look simple at first, but once the rhythm of shooting and reloading clicks, the satisfaction really kicks in.

We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your excitement. Thank you for playing and supporting Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: Wild West succeeds in delivering a clean and focused experience. There’s a clarity to its design and that simplicity works in its favor. The mechanics are easy to understand, the objectives are clear, and the game respects the player’s time.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your thoughtful review. We are truly glad to hear that you felt Wildwest delivers a clean and focused experience. Clarity in design and respect for the player’s time were very important principles during development, so your words mean a lot to us.

We aimed to keep the mechanics intuitive and the objectives straightforward while still offering satisfying VR gunplay. It is very rewarding to know that this simplicity works in the game’s favor.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your perspective and for supporting Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: The game offers multiple modes to play, and the standout for me was the single-player mode against AI opponents. The AI behaves smoothly and moves in a very natural way, to the point where I wished the player character could perform the same.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your thoughtful review. We are very glad to hear that you enjoyed the single-player mode and that the AI opponents felt smooth and natural in their movement.

We put a lot of effort into making the AI feel believable and responsive, so it means a lot to know that it stood out to you. Your comment about wishing the player character could move in a similarly expressive way is very valuable feedback, and we will take it into consideration as we continue refining the overall experience.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your insights with us.

reviews.review_description:
I wasn' sure what too write at first, but after reading other reviews, I noticed a lot of people mentioning that shop has free items. That actually made me more curious that if character customization were added or expanded i would definitely want to try changing things up. 

The shooting itself is simple and comfortable.  It's easy to learn, doesn't feel awkward in VR, and makes the game fun to jump into without much effort.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your detailed and thoughtful review. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your perspective after exploring other player feedback as well.

It is great to hear that the shooting feels simple and comfortable in VR. Making sure the mechanics are intuitive and do not feel awkward was a major focus during development, so we are glad that it makes the game easy to jump into.

We also appreciate your interest in character customization. Expanding customization options and adding more ways for players to personalize their experience is something we are actively considering. Feedback like yours helps us understand what players are excited to see next.

Thank you again for playing Wildwest and for sharing your ideas with us.

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun to play with friends, especially for quick and casual sessions. The shooting feels good and it's easy to jump in and enjoy together. I do think it would be even better if there were more content or modes to keep playing longer.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your thoughtful review. We are very glad to hear that you are enjoying Wildwest with friends, especially for quick and casual sessions. Creating a game that is easy to jump into and fun to share was one of our main goals.

We also truly appreciate your feedback about adding more content or modes. Expanding the game with additional experiences to support longer play sessions is something we are actively considering as we continue developing Wildwest.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your ideas with us.

reviews.review_description: At first, I was loading the revolver one bullet at a time, not realizing there was a faster way. Later on, I figured out that simply bringing the gun to the left side lets you reload much more quickly. Once that reloading motion becomes familiar, the game becomes a lot more fun and starts to flow much better overall.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for sharing your experience in such detail. We really appreciate how you described that moment when reloading finally “clicks.”

It is completely understandable that loading one bullet at a time feels natural at first. Discovering the faster reload motion by bringing the gun to the left side is meant to be one of those small skill breakthroughs. Once that movement becomes muscle memory, the pacing of the game changes and the flow feels much smoother.

We are very glad to hear that the game became more enjoyable after that realization. We will continue working on improving how these mechanics are communicated so more players can reach that satisfying moment even sooner.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your feedback.

reviews.review_description: This game feels like a process of proving yourself as a cowboy while leveling up along the way. At first, the mechanics feel a bit unfamiliar, but once you get used to them, reloading becomes fast and natural, and you start wanting to keep competing against others. The gameplay is comfortable and easy to learn, and it feels like the kind of game that would shine even more if you had friends to play.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for such a thoughtful and well-written review. We really appreciate the way you described Wildwest as a journey of proving yourself as a cowboy. That sense of growth from unfamiliar mechanics to fast and natural reloading is exactly the kind of progression we hoped players would experience.

It is great to hear that once the controls click, the competitive drive kicks in as well. We designed the gameplay to feel comfortable and easy to learn, while still rewarding practice and skill.

We also agree that playing with friends can make the experience even more exciting. We will continue working on improving the multiplayer experience and growing the community so more players can enjoy those moments together.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: this game is actually so cute!!? the town, the buildings, the characters! everything feels tiny and fun!! I keep spinning around just looking at stuff before I even start shooting. It's one of those games where the vibe alone makes me smile!!! 💕🤠

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We are truly happy to hear that the town, buildings, and characters made you smile even before the shooting started. Creating a tiny, charming world that players enjoy simply being inside was a big part of our vision.

It means a lot to us that you are spinning around just taking in the atmosphere. That sense of playful immersion is exactly what we hoped to achieve.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing such positive energy about Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: please add more maps! this is the type of game I play when I don't wanna think at all. you load in, shoot, miss, laugh, repeat. it's fast, simple, and doesn't stress me out. perfect for short breaks alone.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your great review. We are really happy to hear that Wildwest is your go-to game when you just want to relax, load in, shoot, laugh, and repeat. That fast, simple, low-stress experience is exactly what we hoped to deliver for short and enjoyable breaks.

We truly appreciate your request for more maps. Expanding the variety of arenas is something we are actively considering, as new environments can bring fresh energy to that quick and repeatable gameplay loop you described.

Thank you again for playing and for supporting Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: This game feels like opening a tiny amusement ride whenever you need a break. You know those shooting ranges at local fairs? it is just like that. It doesn't demand much attention, but it still gives you that quick sense of fun!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for such a beautifully written review. We truly appreciate the way you described Wildwest as a small escape, like stepping into a tiny amusement ride whenever you need a break. That comparison to local fair shooting ranges is especially meaningful to us, as that light, accessible fun is exactly the kind of experience we hoped to create.

We are glad to hear that the game offers a quick and enjoyable moment without demanding too much attention. Providing that easy-to-jump-in, satisfying VR experience is one of our core goals.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your thoughtful perspective.

reviews.review_description: I'm really enjoying the game, but I keep wishing that there were a bit more guidance for new players like me. The game will fell even better if it helped players understand these systems a little more without breaking immersion.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your thoughtful feedback and for enjoying Wildwest. We are very glad to hear that you are having a good time with the game.

We truly appreciate your point about needing more guidance for new players. Helping players understand the systems more clearly without breaking immersion is an important balance to achieve, especially in VR. We are actively looking into ways to improve onboarding, tutorials, and subtle in-game hints so that the mechanics feel more intuitive from the start.

Your feedback helps us refine the experience for both new and returning players. Thank you again for sharing your thoughts and supporting Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: Simple shooting game and thus everyone knows how to play. Very interactive and well designed and well planned.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your kind review. We are really glad to hear that Wildwest was better than you expected.

Our goal was to create a simple shooting experience that feels intuitive right away, so anyone can jump in and start playing without a steep learning curve. At the same time, we focused heavily on interaction and thoughtful design to make the experience feel immersive in VR.

It truly means a lot to us that you noticed the planning and design behind the game. Thank you again for playing and for sharing your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Can I move like the enemies too? I can't figure it out, maybe it was in the tutorial which I normally (always) blow through. I wanna move like them!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your question and for your enthusiasm about the movement.

The AI enemies are able to perform rolling actions as part of their combat behavior. However, for players in VR, implementing that same type of rolling movement is much more challenging due to comfort and motion considerations. Fast rotational or full-body roll movements in VR can easily cause discomfort or motion sickness, so player movement is intentionally designed to stay stable and comfortable.

We understand that the AI’s dynamic movement looks exciting, and we truly appreciate that you want to move like them. We are always exploring ways to enhance player expression while keeping the VR experience safe and comfortable.

Thank you again for playing and for your thoughtful question.

reviews.review_description: Simple concept executed really well. Manual reloads, solid mechanics, and tense 1v1 duels. Very fun and my hands kept fumbling bullets...

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your kind review. We are really glad to hear that you are enjoying the game and that the simple concept, manual reloads, and tense 1v1 duels stood out to you.

Those moments where your hands fumble the bullets under pressure are exactly the kind of tension we hoped to create in VR. That physical interaction and slight chaos during reloads are meant to make each duel feel intense and personal.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: The visuals are charming, and the shooting mechanics feel precise and satisfying. If you are looking for something enjoyable, go for it.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your kind review. We are truly happy to hear that you found the visuals charming and the shooting mechanics precise and satisfying. Creating an experience that feels both approachable and fun while maintaining solid VR gunplay has always been one of our main goals.

Your recommendation means a lot to us and motivates the team to keep improving and expanding Wildwest. Thank you again for playing and for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: Charming and easy-to-play shooter with great fell but it could really shine with a bit more content

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your kind words and for describing Wildwest as charming. We are glad to hear that you found it easy to play and enjoyed the overall feel of the shooting experience.

We also truly appreciate your feedback about adding more content. Expanding the game with additional modes, maps, and features is something we are actively considering to help Wildwest grow and shine even more.

Your support and suggestions help guide our development direction. Thank you again for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: These AIs are smart and somehow know my next move. I honestly enjoyed the single player mode against them. More levels please please

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your great feedback. We are very happy to hear that you enjoyed playing against the AI in single player mode and that they felt smart and challenging. Creating opponents that feel responsive and engaging without being unfair is something we put a lot of effort into.

We also appreciate your request for more levels. Expanding the single player experience with additional stages and content is something we are actively considering for future updates.

Thank you again for playing and for encouraging us to grow Wildwest even further.

reviews.review_description: This game is fun and accessible, but I keep thinking about replay value. The core mechanics are solid, and the shooting feels good, but after a while it starts to feel repetitive.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your honest and well-balanced review. We are very glad to hear that you found the game fun and accessible, and that the core shooting mechanics feel solid. That foundation is something we worked hard to get right.

We also truly appreciate your thoughts on replay value. You are absolutely correct that long-term engagement depends on variety and fresh experiences. Expanding content, introducing new modes, and adding additional challenges are all areas we are actively considering to make Wildwest more rewarding over time.

Your feedback helps guide our future updates. Thank you again for playing and for sharing your perspective.

reviews.review_description: Ive been asking my friends to join me on this adventure. Wish there are many online shooters so that we can make 2 on 2.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for bringing your friends into Wildwest and for sharing your thoughts. We are really happy to hear that you want to experience the game together as a team.

We understand that having more online players makes modes like 2v2 even more exciting. Growing the player base and improving matchmaking across platforms are important goals for us, and we are continuously working toward making team matches easier to find and join.

We truly appreciate you inviting your friends and helping build the Wildwest community. Thank you again for your support.

reviews.review_title: Bring out the kid in me
reviews.review_description: Looks cartoony but that's what makes it better. Makes me feel like a kid again. Try and get close and kill them it's fun.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your kind and energetic review. We are really glad to hear that the cartoony style brought out that playful, kid-like feeling again. That light and expressive art direction was meant to make the world feel fun and approachable while still delivering satisfying VR gunplay.

Getting up close and going for bold plays can definitely make matches intense and exciting. It is great to know you are enjoying those moments.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_title: Cute design. Fun all the way.
reviews.review_description: Used to play a lot of serious shooters on other platforms. Never thought I would like simple and cute looking shooting games but this is great for short rounds!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your kind review. It really means a lot to hear this from someone who has experience with more serious shooters on other platforms.

We designed Wildwest to offer a lighter, more approachable visual style while still delivering satisfying and responsive shooting mechanics. We are glad it works well for short, enjoyable rounds and offers something a little different from more intense titles.

Thank you again for giving it a try and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: Love the arrows! Same mechanics but it adds flare to it! Hope this games gets some big updates!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for the great energy in your review. We are really happy to hear that you love the arrows. Keeping the same core mechanics while adding a different style and flair was exactly the intention behind that option.

It means a lot to us that you are looking forward to bigger updates. We are continuously working on expanding and improving Wildwest, and feedback like yours motivates us to keep pushing the game further.

Thank you again for playing and for supporting Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: The controls are simple and intuitive, which made the game enjoyable from start to finish. I never felt frustrated by the mechanics, allowing me to focus on the action and fully enjoy the Wild West atmosphere.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your kind and thoughtful review. We are truly glad to hear that the controls felt simple and intuitive, and that you were able to enjoy the experience without frustration.

Making sure the mechanics feel natural in VR was one of our biggest priorities, so it means a lot to know that it allowed you to focus on the action and fully enjoy the Wild West atmosphere.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your positive experience with us.

reviews.review_description: It's not bad but I keep thinking why I got it. Guess it's all hindsight but if anyone wants to try it go ahead. It's not horrible.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for sharing your honest feedback. We understand that sometimes a game may feel different after spending more time with it, and we truly appreciate you giving Wildwest a try.

Our goal is to deliver a unique VR dueling experience with hands-on mechanics and competitive matches. We know that not every game will perfectly match every player’s expectations, and that is valuable insight for us as developers.

We are continuously working on improving content, balance, and overall polish to make the experience feel more rewarding and worthwhile. Thank you again for taking the time to leave your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: that guy talks too much. game is fun but seriously do something about tutorial please

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your honest feedback. We are glad to hear that you are enjoying the game, and we also appreciate your comment about the tutorial.

We understand that if the tutorial guide feels too talkative, it can slow down the experience. Our goal was to make sure new players clearly understand the mechanics, but we recognize that some players prefer a faster and more streamlined introduction.

We are looking into ways to improve the tutorial flow, including making it more concise or offering options to skip or shorten certain explanations.

Thank you again for sharing your thoughts. Your feedback helps us make Wildwest better.

reviews.review_description: It was pleasure to play this game. The characters feel soft and cute, almost like dolls that could be sold as figures like Amibos.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your kind review. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed playing Wildwest and that the characters left such a positive impression.

We are especially happy that you described them as soft and cute, almost like collectible figures. That stylized and slightly toy-like feeling was part of our artistic direction, so it means a lot to know it resonated with you.

We will continue refining both the visuals and the gameplay to make the world of Wildwest even more charming and immersive.
Thank you again for your support.

reviews.review_description: Not gonna deny kids will like this. Ain't for me though.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for taking the time to share your honest thoughts. We understand that Wildwest’s art style and tone may not appeal to everyone. While the visuals are stylized and approachable, our goal was to combine that charm with competitive VR gunplay and hands-on mechanics.

Even if it was not the right fit for you, we truly appreciate you giving it a try. Feedback like yours helps us better understand how different players experience the game, and it guides us as we continue refining and expanding Wildwest.

Thank you again for your review.

reviews.review_description: Shooting feels amazing, and this game would be even more fun if there were more people online to play with!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you very much for your feedback. We are really happy to hear that you enjoyed the shooting mechanics and found them amazing. That immersive gunplay is at the heart of Wildwest.

We understand that having more online players can make the experience even more exciting and competitive. We are continuously working on growing the community and improving matchmaking so players can find matches more easily across Meta and Steam.

Your support and enthusiasm truly help the game grow. Thank you again for playing and for sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: Lost cause I rapid fired too much and dropped the bullets a lot while reloading. ~(￣▽￣)~*

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for sharing your experience. It sounds like the heat of the duel got intense. Rapid firing can definitely feel satisfying, but managing your bullets carefully is a big part of surviving in Wildwest.

Reloading under pressure is meant to create those tense moments where every movement counts. Even dropping a few bullets can turn the tide of a match.

We hope you jump back in and take your revenge with steadier hands next time. Thank you for playing and for leaving a review.

reviews.review_description: I think this game could have been. Right now its for kids (they may like it)...

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for sharing your honest thoughts. We understand that the current version of Wildwest may not match what you were hoping it could be.

While the art style is intentionally stylized and approachable, our aim is to combine that visual tone with meaningful VR gunplay and competitive mechanics. We recognize that expectations can differ from player to player, and feedback like yours helps us reflect on how we can strengthen the overall experience.

We will continue improving content, depth, and long-term engagement to make Wildwest more satisfying for a wider range of players. Thank you again for giving it a try and for leaving your feedback.

reviews.review_title: Knew it before I even played it
reviews.review_description: This is for children and is so much fun. I think parents will like this too.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for sharing your thoughts and for giving Wildwest a try. We are glad to hear that you found it fun.

While the art style is intentionally stylized and approachable, our goal is to create an experience that can be enjoyed by a wide range of players, including adults who appreciate competitive VR shooting mechanics. We are happy that you see it as something parents and younger players could enjoy together.

We will continue improving and expanding the game to make it engaging for as many players as possible. Thank you again for your review.

reviews.review_description: Miss miss miss hit hit hit reload...reload...reload.......re...load...

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for the fun review. That “miss miss miss hit hit hit reload… reload…” rhythm perfectly captures the tension of a Wildwest duel.

Those moments where every shot counts and reloading feels like it takes forever are exactly what we aim for in our gunplay design. It is great to hear that you are enjoying that back-and-forth intensity.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: Easy~ I owned every round.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Sounds like we have a true sharpshooter in town. Owning every round is impressive.

We are glad to hear that the game felt easy and that you were able to dominate your matches. At the same time, we are always working on balance and new challenges to make sure every duel stays exciting and rewarding.

Thank you for playing Wildwest and for sharing your experience.

reviews.review_description: Can't lose. All wins.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Sounds like we’ve got a true gunslinger in town. All wins and no losses is impressive.

We are glad to hear you are dominating your matches and having that unstoppable Wild West moment. That confident duelist feeling is exactly what we hope players experience when everything clicks.

Keep sharpening those skills, and thank you for riding with Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: It'll be great if it came out like worlds. The characters are so cute. Its like a chill map with dumb little cowboys shooting at each other, and yes those blazing guns are a lot of fun!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your fun and honest review. We are really happy to hear that you enjoyed the cute graphics and the overall chill Wild West vibe. Creating a lighthearted atmosphere with charming little cowboys while still keeping the gunplay exciting was exactly what we aimed for.

We appreciate your suggestion about expanding it further, and we will continue working on ways to grow and improve the experience.

Thank you again for playing and for sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: When u play long enough it becomes insanely satisfying🤪. Every shot feels meaningful because reloading takes real effort. Very easy to get used to, but that’s what makes it good.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for your great review. We are really happy to hear that the game becomes even more satisfying the longer you play.

That feeling where every shot matters because reloading takes real effort is exactly what we aimed for in the design. When the mechanics become familiar and the rhythm of shooting and reloading clicks, the experience becomes much more rewarding.

We truly appreciate you sharing your experience. Thank you for playing and supporting Wildwest.

reviews.review_description: Once I figured out how to reload bullets fast, the game became super fun. It looks funny when friends do this and you are just watching. AI mode is super hard btw.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for sharing your experience. We are really glad to hear that once the fast reload clicked, the game became much more fun for you. That moment when the mechanic turns into muscle memory is exactly what we aim for in our design.

Watching friends panic-reload can definitely be entertaining, especially when everyone is under pressure. We are also happy to hear you tried the AI mode. It is intentionally challenging, but we will continue fine-tuning the balance to keep it tough yet fair.

Thank you again for playing and for leaving your feedback.

reviews.review_description: I had fun with this playing it with my friend. I lost every round. Don't waste the bullets too much reloading is when you're most vulnerable.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for playing Wildwest with your friend and for sharing your experience. We are glad to hear that you had fun, even if you lost every round. Sometimes those are the most memorable matches.

You are absolutely right about reloading being a vulnerable moment. Managing bullets and timing your reload carefully is a key part of the strategy, especially in close duels. It is great to see players picking up on those tactical elements.

We will continue improving the balance and overall experience so matches stay intense and rewarding. Thank you again for your support and for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_description: There are some errors that make you restart the game but I believe those will be fixed right? Other then that the game is fun and clicking

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Jooyoo, developer of Dmong.

Thank you for playing Wildwest and for sharing your feedback. We sincerely appreciate you pointing out the errors that require restarting the game. That is certainly not the experience we want our players to have.

We are actively working on improving stability and fixing known issues through ongoing updates. If you are able to share more details about when the error occurs, it would greatly help us resolve the issue more quickly.

We are very glad to hear that you are enjoying the game aside from those issues. We will continue refining Wildwest to deliver a smoother and more polished experience.
Thank you again for your support and feedback.
